---
name: Bug Report
about: Something broken or not working as expected
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## What happened?

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to reproduce

1. Start the server with `npm run dev`
2. Navigate to '...'
3. Click on '...'
4. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen instead.

## Environment

- OS: (e.g., Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 14, Fedora 43)
- Node.js version: (run `node -v`)
- Browser: (e.g., Firefox 128, Chrome 131)

## Server logs

Paste any relevant output from the terminal where `npm run dev` is running. Look for `[ERROR]`, `[FEED ERROR]`, or stack traces.

```
paste logs here
```

## Screenshots

If the bug is visual, screenshots help a lot.

## Additional context

- Which channel were you on? (Cyber, World News, OSINT, etc.)
- Were any API keys configured in `.env`?
- Did this work before? If so, when did it break?
